claim_boundary: Diagnostics explain target-quality problems. They do not change already-scored validation verdicts and must not be used to retune a spent holdout.
interpretation: The development matrix is the weak point, not Cambridge or Molicell.
RADAR4KIT corrected EIS plus PULSE dominates the current KK failures.
Any future frozen holdout should declare whether KK failures are advisory metadata or hard exclusions before scoring.
recommended_next_actions: Inspect RADAR4KIT EIS conversion and sign conventions before trusting it as development target evidence.
Add a pre-score KK gate to the next frozen validation contract, with threshold and exclusion policy declared before results.
Do not retroactively filter Cambridge or Molicell after seeing their validation metrics.
